## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content production, performance metrics, and strategic alignment for Engine's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track with 10 articles in pipeline and 5 published this week](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Early performance signals show growth in clicks and impressions, particularly for expense/financial management content](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Need to align on content strategy between GrowthX and Engine's internal team to avoid duplication](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Exploring ways to better track and leverage LLM visibility and impact](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Discussions ongoing about content strategy for RoomBlocks.com initiative](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Performance

  - [10 articles in production, 5 published this week](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Seeing growth in clicks (decent jump) and impressions (larger increase)](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Expense and financial management content performing best, aligning with Project Cruise messaging](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Looker dashboard combining GA4 and Search Console data available for detailed performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Noticed potential content overlap between GrowthX and Engine's internal team](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Joel to loop in Barry to prevent duplication of efforts](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Discussion on clarifying content lanes for different teams (intern team vs. GrowthX)](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

### LLM Tracking and Visibility

  - [Joel requested access to Scrunch for LLM citation tracking](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Kyle to follow up on Scrunch access and data sharing](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [Exploring additional data sources (brand searches, WebDirect) to understand LLM impact](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Joel seeking insights on increasing LLM visibility and tracking performance beyond just referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

### RoomBlocks.com Initiative

  - [Marcel met with Cole and Joel to discuss RoomBlocks concept](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Awaiting Marcel's recommendations and thoughts](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Discussing how to approach content strategy for RoomBlocks vs. Engine.com](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Considering use cases (e.g., disaster relief) that could work for both platforms](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to follow up on Scrunch access for Joel and share LLM citation data](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Carrie to get an update from Daryl on Scrunch data and persona-based updates](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Marcel to provide recommendations for RoomBlocks content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Team to explore ways to incorporate LLM tracking and visibility into ongoing discussions](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Carrie to review existing group booking content and brainstorm ideas for content that could work for both Engine and RoomBlocks without diluting either brand](https://fathom.video/share/yzDq2pyrMyk2YKTR3w4pUchs84CL_n4y?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
